form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Most recently favourite; scored a big 7 len win at this track March 12 over 1400m defeating Heritage Song carrying 55kg at $1.10. Before that favourite; won by 6 len at this track February 10 over 1500m defeating Sept Couleurs carrying 55kg at $1.80. Only has a small field to contend with and looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: At the latest run 10th of 12 at this track on March 27 over 1500m, 13 len behind Melt carrying 55kg at $34.70. The start before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 12 at this track on March 12 over 1400m, 7 len behind Elaine Asti carrying 55kg at $7.40. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.
